begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสัญญา

last_calcint_date.text: วันที่เคลื่อนไหว

root.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , '!begining_of_contract_1!' as begining_of_contract_1 , '!begining_of_contract_2!' as begining_of_contract_2 , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as member_name , sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , current_date from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance = '0' --and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = '051240' --and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = 'ส000027/59' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no
